infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Oye Sunn needs your location to trigger reminders when you enter or leave your saved places.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Oye Sunn needs your location to set up location-based reminders.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Oye Sunn needs your location to trigger reminders when you enter or leave your saved places.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Oye Sunn to always access your location so reminders work even when the app is closed.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Oye Sunn needs your location to set up location-based reminders.
